project_type: Rust CLI application - Tic Tac Toe game
build_system: Cargo (Rust 1.92.0). No external crates allowed due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network. Only std library.
test_framework: Built-in Rust #[cfg(test)] module with #[test] attributes. Run via cargo test.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'cargo build' to confirm compilation. 2. Run 'cargo test' to confirm all unit tests pass. 3. Run 'cargo clippy -- -D warnings' to confirm no lint warnings. 4. Run 'cargo fmt -- --check' to confirm formatting.
setup_instructions: No setup needed. Rust 1.92.0 is pre-installed. cargo init in the repo directory to create Cargo.toml and src/main.rs.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no crate downloads, no cargo registry access. Must use only Rust standard library. Rust 1.92.0 with rustfmt and clippy available.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. The repo currently only has a README.md on the feat/tic-tac-toe-rust branch.
key_patterns: Greenfield Rust project. The Cargo project should be initialized at the repo root (/projects/sandbox/Kiro-Test) so Cargo.toml is at the top level alongside README.md.
directory_structure: Currently only README.md at repo root. Will become a standard Cargo project: Cargo.toml at root, src/main.rs as the binary entry point.
